decision_summary: Adopt Rows221-260 as the planning and contract authority for staged model-library intelligence while retaining the complete-download, inventory, acknowledgement, qualification, shadow, and production phase gates in their current fail-closed state.
adopted_decisions: Wave30 metadata, scores, and copy-ready labels are discovery priors only and do not establish binary, runtime, capability, certificate, or production truth.
Rows221-222 may serve as static planning controls while Rows223-260 remain execution-deferred.

A later user download-complete signal must be bound to a frozen expected-download scope, immutable completion manifest, deterministic binary inventory with zero unresolved in-scope assets, and an explicit main-task acknowledgement.
Satisfying the download gate may open staging only; qualification, shadow selection, and production selection each require separate append-only evidence-backed transitions.
No model family, artifact, revision, workflow, adapter bundle, runtime, or certificate authority transfers implicitly to another exact hash or scope.
Production routing hard-filters lifecycle, compatibility, availability, evidence freshness, and exact certificate coverage before ranking.
The model-intelligence package extends the adopted Rows149-220 controller contracts and does not activate the dependent Rows261-320 runtime surfaces.
Rows221-260 are additive and do not change the accepted completion truth of Rows001-220.

worker_review.requested_lane: Claude Sonnet 5 through AI worker dispatcher
worker_review.issue: The preservation package is intentionally untracked, and dispatcher policy accepts only tracked scope.

next_action: Integrate Rows221-260 after Rows149-220 and before Rows261-320 in one protected planning-only checkpoint; do not begin model ingestion or runtime activation.
